interestingFact: India is home to the Taj Mahal, one of the Seven Wonders of the World.
Brazil is home to the Amazon Rainforest, the largest rainforest in the world.
Canada has the longest coastline of any country in the world.
Germany is known for the Autobahn, highways with no speed limit in some areas.
Australia is the only country that is also a continent.
Italy is home to the Colosseum, an ancient Roman amphitheater.
The United States has 50 states and is one of the largest countries by land area.
South Korea is famous for K-pop and advanced technology industries.
Egypt is home to the Great Pyramid of Giza, one of the oldest wonders of the ancient world.
